releaseNotes: Safe fixed 10.4.0 cloud workspace sync patch after the first 10.4.0 patch failed cleanly and restored backup.
Patches the real existing Inventra commercial Supabase sync layer instead of looking for a missing 10.3.x source block.

Keeps same Supabase email/account attached to the same cloud workspace on multiple laptops, so products, suppliers, orders, movements, logs, users, stock counts, kits, reports, settings, and app state stay shared for that account.
Adds a 10.4.0 sync stabilizer that starts sync after clinic unlock, login, startup, focus, online reconnect, and data saves.
Makes live sync faster by enabling incoming auto-apply and outgoing watch mode and reducing polling/debounce timing to near-real-time without redesigning pages.
Includes an optional non-destructive Supabase SQL repair file with workspace, state, event, cursor, backup, and security-log RPC functions. The patch does not run SQL automatically.
No app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, users, Supabase data, updater, branding, or icon assets are deleted.
